articles.title: Canada temporarily bars foreign nationals who visited Congo amid Ebola risk - National
articles.description: Ottawa is launching a temporary ban on foreign nationals entering Canada if they have visted DRC, the site of an ebola outbreak, 21 days before coming to this country.
